ddls:
CREATE TABLE "source_control_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of source control block (e.g., BitKeeper) */,
  "autoGetSource" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether to automatically pull the latest source */,
  "cloneTo" TEXT /* Path to clone the permanent repository */,
  "executable" TEXT /* Path to the source control executable (e.g., bk.exe) */,
  "version" REAL /* Version of the configuration schema */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the project associated with the configuration */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* The URL of the repository */,
  "branch" TEXT /* The branch of the repository (e.g., main, dev) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_control_configs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_control_configs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_control_configs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dynamic_values" (
  "dynamic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dynamic value entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source control configuration */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key associated with the dynamic value */,
  "dynamic_value" TEXT /* Dynamic value associated with the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the dynamic value entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the dynamic value entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the dynamic value entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the dynamic value entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dynamic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dynamic_values_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES source_control_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dynamic_values_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dynamic_values_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration associated with the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES source_control_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ci_cd_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CI/CD pipeline */,
  "pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the CI/CD pipeline */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration associated with the pipeline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ci_cd_pipelines_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES source_control_configs ("config_id")
)
